psd_imported:
Textures have been imported and/or replaced from the PSD.

Replace armature as well? $psd_page
vert_limit:
Cannot delete vertex.

Meshes must have at least 4 vertices.
indices_limit:
Cannot delete triangle.

Meshes must have at least 2 triangles.
tracing_high_gap: This point gap generated an invalid mesh. Please use a lower gap.
import_unrecognized:
File could not be recognized.

Supported files:
- SkelForm armature (.skf)
- Photoshop Document (.psd)
import_err: There was an error reading the file:
import_swf:
SWF files cannot directly be imported.

Check out the [Importing SWF](user-docs/importing-swf.html) help page for a guide on converting SWF files into SKF.
img_unselected_style: Please select a style in the Styles modal, then import the image(s) again.
donating:
If you liked using SkelForm, a [donation](https://ko-fi.com/retropaintt) is highly appreciated!

The donation will be through ko-fi.com.

Thank you for using SkelForm!
crashed:
SkelForm crashed last time.

The crash log is located in the same path as the binary.

Open log file?
error_vid_export:
Something went wrong with this export:

$err

Try changing compability settings, or click 'download ffmpeg' in export if you don't have it.

If nothing works, you may export sprite sequences and create a video using an online converter.
hidden_desc:
Toggle this bone's visibility.
To propagate it to all children, toggle it in Settings > Animation.
locked_desc: Lock this bone to prevent edits from being recorded in animations

startup.empty_recent_files:
Start from scratch, import an SKF/PSD file, or try a sample from the options on the left.

New here? Check out the Starter Guide on the right to be guided on your first rig.
startup.early_access_warning:
WARNING:
SkelForm is a work in progress.
Expect bugs, crashes, and breaking changes on newer versions.
startup.web_note: Start from scratch, import an SKF/PSD file, or try a sample below:
startup.skellington_sample_desc: A character with rubberhose-style limbs, utilizing mesh deformation.
startup.skellina_sample_desc: A character with simple, 2-bone limbs. Does not contain meshes.
startup.error_update:
Something went wrong.

Please check your internet connection and try again.

If the problem persists, it might be on SkelForm's side.

[All Versions Page](https://github.com/Retropaint/SkelForm/releases)
startup.update_available:
New update available: $ver

Go to version page and download manually?
startup.error_ffmpeg:
ffmpeg is not available.

Please ensure it is installed and in your $PATH.
startup.no_updates: You're up to date! This is the latest version.

resources.lang_import:
Paste the localization JSON below.
For examples, see the i18n folder.

styles_modal.heading: Styles ℹ
styles_modal.heading_desc:
Styles allow hotswapping of textures to create multiple outfits/skins.

The first active style containing the bone's texture name will be used.
styles_modal.style_preview_empty:
No textures in this style.

Click to select and add to it.
styles_modal.texture_desc:
Drag to a bone to set this as it's texture.
Drag above/below another texture to change order.
styles_modal.assigned_textures_desc:
Assign textures to bones here.

If this style is inactive, bones will switch to a texture of the same name from the first active style top-down.
styles_modal.same_name: There is already a texture with the same name in this style.
styles_modal.styles_empty:
All textures must be in a style.

Styles are batches of textures, used to represent outfits or skins.

To add a style, click 'New' above.
styles_modal.textures_empty:
This style's textures will appear here.

Click 'Import' above to import an image to add as a texture.
styles_modal.assigned_empty:
Once a texture is added, the bone hierarchy will be shown on the left.

All bones' assigned textures will be shown here.

atlas_modal.no_pending:
If the imported image is a single texture, simply click 'Done'.

If it's a texture atlas, drag the image or click 'Add Texture' to add a new slice of texture.

The atlas will be discarded once done, and will need to be re-imported to add more textures.

export_modal.heading: Export
export_modal.no_anims:
Export unavailable - no animations.

To export the rest pose, create an empty animation.

armature.bake_ik_desc:
If ticked, inverse kinematics will be baked into all animations where targets are moved.

Recommended if inverse kinematics is only used in animations, especially if developing your own runtime.
armature.exclude_ik_desc:
Inverse kinematics will be assumed off when exporting.

Recommended to prevent runtimes from mixing up baked and real-time inverse kinematics.
armature.clear_color_desc: The color that transparent pixels will be represented by

image.image_sequences_desc: Instead of using sheets, sprites will be exported individually
image.animations_check_desc: Include this animation in the export?

video.use_system_ffmpeg_desc: SkelForm comes with its own binary for ffmpeg, but this will make it call 'ffmpeg' globally instead.

armature_panel.heading: Armature
armature_panel.styles_desc:
Create a style, add textures, then assign bones to use it. Click on styles in the dropdown to toggle them.

Bones use textures based on their index. To change it, select a bone > 'Tex Index'.

Multiple styles can be active at once. Bones assinged to multiple active styles will use the top-most first.

bone_panel.heading: Bone
bone_panel.name: Name:
bone_panel.global_zindex_inc_desc:
Raise this z-index, as well as all z-indexes higher than this, by 1.

Useful for fixing 'same z-index' warnings.
bone_panel.bone_empty:
This bone currently has no texture and is an invisible point.

To add a texture to it, assign one via the Textures setup above.

This bone may be dragged in the Armature list, to change its order or to assign it as a child to another bone.
bone_panel.target_bone: This is a target bone to
bone_panel.group_color_desc:
Color used for this bone and it's children.

Set alpha to 0 to use default color.

inverse_kinematics.heading: Inverse Kinematics
inverse_kinematics.desc:
Automatically adjust and bend bones to reach a specified target.
Best used for joints like shoulders and legs.

After the joints have been set up, click the checkbox next to this header to activate IK.
inverse_kinematics.enabled_desc:
Should inverse kinematics be running for this set of joints?

Untick this to allow setting up joint positions and rotations.
inverse_kinematics.effector_desc:
Create or assign a new family to this bone.

If this is the first bone in the hierarchy with the family index, it is the root bone.
Assign the same index to other bones to form a proper IK family.
inverse_kinematics.constraint_desc:
CC: Clockwise, all Middle effectors will move up/right (ie; legs)

CCW: Counter-clockwise, all Middle effectors will move down/left (ie; shoulders)
inverse_kinematics.cant_edit:
Transforms cannot be edited for IK child bones.

To adjust the distance between this bone and the previous, edit the Distance field in the IK section below.
inverse_kinematics.distance_desc: Adjust the distance between this bone, and the previous one in the IK family.

mesh_deformation.heading: Mesh Deformation
mesh_deformation.desc: Turn this texture into a deformable mesh. Vertices can be bound to other bones with custom weights to influence them.
mesh_deformation.trace_desc: Generate a mesh based on the texture shape
mesh_deformation.trace_finish_desc: Finish tracing and hide tracing options
mesh_deformation.pathing_desc: Vertices will follow this bind along a path formed with adjacent binds.
mesh_deformation.no_bound_verts:
Double-click on vertices to add or remove them to this bind.

Vertex weights will be configurable here.
mesh_deformation.density_desc: A higher gap spaces out potential points. Increase if there are too many points close to each other
mesh_deformation.padding_desc: Extra space around the image, allowing points to be more accurate around edges

physics.heading: Physics
physics.sway_desc:
When this bone's parent moves, it will sway against the momentum.
Useful for tails, clothes, hair, etc
physics.parent_has_physics: This bone's parent has rotation physics. Adjust its distance in the Physics section below. ℹ
physics.parent_has_physics_desc: To accurately simulate wind/air resistance, bones should only be distanced horizontally to their parent.

editing.heading: Editing
editing.edit_while_playing_desc:
By default, edits won't be recorded if an animation is playing to prevent accidents.

Tick this allow editing while an animation is playing.
editing.propagate_visibility_desc:
By default, bones do not propagate their current visibily onto their children.

This is to replicate simple runtime behavior, where propagation is likely to not be implemented.

rendering.heading: Rendering
rendering.translucent_desc: Makes this box translucent to preview rendering changes

keyboard.heading: Keyboard
keyboard.timeline_zoom_mode_desc: The timeline editor will zoom, instead of scroll, when scrolling and holding this modifier.

miscellaneous.heading: Miscellaneous
miscellaneous.select_exact_bone: Select exact bone in click ℹ:
miscellaneous.select_exact_bone_desc: Clicking on a bone that is named 'Texture' (any case) will select the parent. Tick this to directly select the texture.
miscellaneous.keep_tex_str: Keep texture name after renaming ℹ:
miscellaneous.keep_tex_str_desc: By default, renaming a texture will also adjust bones using it to change their tex name. Tick this to preserve bone texture names after renaming.
miscellaneous.use_fallback_desc:
If the current language is missing any localization, the English version will be used by default.

Tick this to force all missing texts to show their key instead.

keyframe_editor.heading: Animation
keyframe_editor.invalid_fps:
Some keyframes will be lost.

Potential fixes:
- Spread out keyframes
- Incrementally change FPS

keyframe_panel.empty:
Nothing to edit, as this is the first frame.

To adjust this keyframe's transition, select the one after it.
keyframe_panel.snap_note:
With this preset, values will snap between keyframes instead of interpolating.

To re-enable the graph, change the preset above.

polar.delete_bone: Are you sure to delete this bone?
polar.delete_anim: Are you sure to delete this animation?
polar.delete_tex: Are you sure to delete this texture?
polar.delete_style: Are you sure to delete this style?
polar.unsaved:
Quit and discard unsaved changes?

(Click 'Yes' to confirm)
polar.delete_keyframe_line: Are you sure to delete this keyframe line?

warnings.heading: Warnings ℹ
warnings.desc:
These are quirks that need your attention to fix.
Runtimes may have issues with this armature if not dealt with.
warnings.OnlyPath: $bone can't have a single bind that's a path.
warnings.OnlyIk: $bone is the only bone IK family $ik_family_id.
warnings.NoWeights: $bone's bind $bind has all weights set to 0.
warnings.BoneOutOfFamily: Bones of IK family $ik_family_id are not all within the same root.
